emails.subject: Nevada Power
emails.body: Nevada Power I'm working on settlement issues for NVP, DMS 12398. Can you provide me with a deal#? Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Nevada Power
emails.body: RE: Nevada Power Hi Lisa, The counterparty is showing this deal but I am not and their deal numbers are different from ours. They supplied a tag number but it was not enough information so I have asked the counterparty for addition information and I will get back with you on this. Thanks. To: Minnis, Sabrina

emails.subject: RE: Nevada Power
emails.body: Thanks. Just to clarify, I am needing Enron's deal number. lisa To: Gang, Lisa
